prestazioni: Engine: W16 (quad-turbocharged, 8.0L, engine code **W16Q**) – Replace OEM IHI turbochargers with **Garrett GTX5533R Gen II** turbos (86mm compressor wheels, 1.15 A/R turbine housings) paired with **Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates** and **TurboSmart Race Port BOV** for reduced lag and 1,800+ HP potential on E85.

Fuel System: Upgrade to **Bosch Motorsport MS15.1 ECU** with **Motec PDM30** power distribution module, **ID1700x injectors** (side-feed, 2,400cc/min), and **AEM 400LPH dual-pump fuel system** with **Radium Engineering fuel surge tank** to support 30psi boost on methanol-injected setup.

Drivetrain: **Ricardo 7-speed DSG** reinforcement with **PPG Stage 3+ gearset (2.0 final drive ratio)**, **South Bend Clutch dual-disc ceramic clutch**, and **OS Giken Super Lock LSD** for 0-60mph in sub-2.0s. Pair with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (285/30R20 front, 355/25R21 rear) on **BBS FI-R 20x12/21x13.5" forged wheels** for optimal grip.
estetica: Aero: **Liberty Walk LB-WORKS Vitesse-widebody kit** (carbon fiber, 80mm extended fenders) with **Vorsteiner V-FF107 front splitter** and **Rocket Bunny GT wing (2.2m span, 3D-printed titanium supports)** for 1,200kg downforce at 250mph. Underbody **Aeroflow carbon diffuser** with **Gurney flaps** for stability.

Exterior: **PPG "Liquid Black" matte paint with **3M Scotchlite 980CR retroreflective flakes** (visible under headlights), **Novitec carbon fiber engine cover** (exposed W16 with **ANSA titanium exhaust tips**), and **HRE FF03 3-piece wheels** in **Brushed Titanium** finish with **Bugatti OEM laser-etched center caps**.

Interior: **Recaro Pole Position CS-II bucket seats** (carbon-Kevlar shell, 6-point Schroth harnesses), **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel** (suede, quick-release hub), and **Alcantara headliner with **LED fiber-optic starlight** (10,000 strands). **AEM CD-7 dash** replaces OEM cluster with **1,000HP+ boost gauge** and **G-force logging**.
